businessNameNote: Generic sign text, not enough to prove legal/trading name.
observations: Discord image OCR showed a roofing/restoration sign with phone 0424 371 622 and free in-person quote offer.
No dedicated website was visible on the sign.
notes: Photo text says call Greg; verify contact name before sending.

results.title: M&B Roofing — Better Pages
results.summary: Phone matched the listing. It identifies M&B Roofing, Jamison Town NSW, email ghilton@live.com.au, Facebook, roof restoration/repairs/gutters/tile-metal services, and free quotes.
services: roof gutters fascia and down pipes

metadata.conflict: Photo says 40 years; directory says 50 years. Verify before using in customer-facing copy.

conflicts: Experience claim conflict: photo says 40 years; Better Pages listing says 50 years. Verify before using in customer-facing copy.
